title: SKYSPER Small Hiking Daypack, 20L Lightweight Travel Backpacks Day Hike Pack with Waist Strap for Women Men
features: BREATHABLE AND ERGONOMIC: The shoulder straps and back are both made of mesh hollowed out thick pads which can reduce sweating for extra comfort. The breathable grooved carrying system keeps your back comfortable and relaxed during travel. Our backpacks are designed so that you can lighten the burden on your back during a hiking or a trip.

WATER-RESISTANT AND DURABLE: SKYSPER 20l Hiking Backpack is made of high-density 600D polyester and 210D nylon plaid fabric, which is water-resistant, tear resistant and wear-resistant. All of the backpack's stress points and shoulder straps are reinforced with lap-knots to ensure long lasting durability.

SAFETY DESIGN: The small daypack comes with an outdoor emergency rescue guide providing additional safety information for lovers of the outdoors. The reflective design also increases visibility, making it safer at night. It comes with safety whistle, making it the perfect hiking backpack for outdoor activities.

ADJUSTABLE AND REMOVABLE STRAP SYSTEM: The 20L day backpack also features detachable straps and an adjustable chest strap, allowing it to meet the requirements of a variety of situations. The hiking daypack is designed to have convenient trekking pole fixtures. Open front-end plugins can also be adapted to different hiking gear and multi-functional extensions.

WIDELY USED & UNIQUE APPEARANCE: The women hiking day pack is good for a comfortable overseas plane trip, day city excursion, day hiking, weekend getaway and daily use,etc. Holds a lot without being too oversized and bulky. It is perfect for short hikes, work-home commutes and doing errands. The BOGDA20 day hike backpack is the perfect combination of function and fashion, with a simple and smooth design featuring detachable elastic band on the front panel and contrasting embroidery.
